_comment: Pakistan launch registry (docs/10 §4). Honest caveat: dedicated ED-specific helplines are essentially absent; lean on general MH support + advisor network + treatment-finder + international fallback. Crisis copy in Urdu (RTL, docs/12). Anchor NAMES only; every contact value TODO-VERIFY. Never NEDA (CLAUDE.md #7).
